The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Bewitched Hall

Air thickens with each breath.
AI merges with cosmic agendas.
Air tastes of late regrets.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

Writings on the Wall

  • SESWSESEESWWSWSSSENNEESSEENNWNNESEEEESSUNNWNENWWWWWNENNEEENWWWNEEEESUNWSWSSESWWWWSSEEUNWNNWNNWWSESWSWN
  • Give a monkey a gun and he is free
